sql:
SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey FROM partsupp_vec_p
WHERE ps_text_embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND ps_partkey BETWEEN 320001 AND 340000
ORDER BY ps_text_embedding <-> (SELECT ps_text_embedding FROM partsupp_vec_p WHERE ps_text_embedding IS NOT NULL
   AND ps_partkey BETWEEN 320001 AND 340000
 ORDER BY ps_partkey, ps_suppkey OFFSET 4501 LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey FROM partsupp_vec_p
WHERE ps_text_embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND ps_partkey BETWEEN 320001 AND 340000
ORDER BY ps_text_embedding <-> (SELECT ps_text_embedding FROM partsupp_vec_p WHERE ps_text_embedding IS NOT NULL
   AND ps_partkey BETWEEN 320001 AND 340000
 ORDER BY ps_partkey, ps_suppkey OFFSET 401 LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 10;

SELECT p_partkey FROM part_vec_p
WHERE text_embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND p_partkey BETWEEN 980001 AND 1000000
ORDER BY text_embedding <-> (SELECT text_embedding FROM part_vec_p WHERE text_embedding IS NOT NULL
   AND p_partkey BETWEEN 980001 AND 1000000
 ORDER BY p_partkey OFFSET 67 LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 80;

SELECT p_partkey FROM part_vec_p
WHERE text_embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND p_partkey BETWEEN 320001 AND 340000
ORDER BY text_embedding <-> (SELECT text_embedding FROM part_vec_p WHERE text_embedding IS NOT NULL
   AND p_partkey BETWEEN 320001 AND 340000
 ORDER BY p_partkey OFFSET 131 LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 20;
